mapper.select: SELECT t0.*, t1.channel_name FROM article t0 LEFT JOIN channel t1 ON t0.channel_id = t1.channel_id WHERE t0.article_id = #{articleId} AND t0.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM article WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_top DESC, article_id DESC
SELECT * FROM article WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, slug, content, summary, cover_image, channel_id, create_user_id, create_user_name, status, is_top, keyword, view_count, publish_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{slug}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{coverImage}, #{channelId}, #{createUserId}, #{createUserName}, #{status}, #{isTop}, #{keyword}, 0, #{publishTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE article
title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, channel_id = #{channelId}, status = #{status}, is_top = #{isTop}, keyword = #{keyword}, publish_time = #{publishTime},
WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET deleted = 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
